codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review confirmed the ambiguous-dispatch follow-up remains present on the propagated branch in the reachable descendant commit `09af399193b24d1ff5247d24ea50206fda12bf3f` (`fix(invoice): enforce single-slip gate before order-level invoice marker writes`). The narrowed `InvoiceService`/`InvoiceServiceTest` diff still implements the requested fail-closed behavior: dispatch references are withheld unless a concrete single-slip invoice link exists, so ambiguous legacy multi-slip shapes cannot overstate provenance.

summary: Pass. Ambiguous invoice-to-dispatch linkage remains fail-closed on branch-reachable commit `09af399193b24d1ff5247d24ea50206fda12bf3f`, with focused `InvoiceService` and regression-test changes only.
